title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs attempted to build an AI-generated ad campaign using Agent Zero but encountered persistent LiteLLM errors and critical failures that made the framework unusable. He concludes that Agent Zero has promise but is unreliable for production work without comprehensive testing first, and recommends alternatives like Claude Code.
